name: Peoples Bank Of  Kentucky, Inc.
description_short: Peoples Bank of Kentucky is a full-service regional bank offering personal and business banking products including checking, savings, loans, and digital banking services.
description_long:
Peoples Bank of Kentucky operates as a traditional community bank serving customers in Kentucky with a comprehensive suite of financial products. The bank has established itself as a regional banking institution with both personal and business banking divisions, supported by multiple branch locations and digital banking infrastructure. The institution holds routing number 042102788 and maintains an active online presence through its website at peoplesbankofky.com.

The bank offers a broad range of deposit products including personal checking, personal savings, CDs, and retirement accounts on the personal side, while business customers can access business checking, business savings, and specialized deposit services. On the lending side, Peoples Bank provides personal loans, home loans, mortgage services, business loans, and agricultural loans through dedicated lending teams. They have invested in digital infrastructure offering online banking, mobile banking, online account applications, online mortgage applications, and online loan applications for both personal and commercial purposes.

Peoples Bank distinguishes itself through specialized services tailored to different customer segments. Their deposit services include remote capture capabilities for business customers, allowing deposits to be made without visiting a branch. They offer merchant processing services, Zelle integration for digital payments, debit cards, credit cards, and financial calculators. The bank emphasizes digital banking safety and provides eStatements alongside traditional banking services, with a dedicated focus on both personal and agricultural lending markets.

As a traditional regional bank, Peoples Bank of Kentucky serves customers who prefer established brick-and-mortar banking with digital convenience options. However, the website provides limited information about specific product features, rates, terms, or competitive advantages compared to larger national banks. Customers should contact the bank directly via phone (888-445-BANK) or their contact form to obtain detailed product specifications and pricing information. Many banks offer installment loans with fixed monthly payments, giving borrowers a clear payoff timeline.
pros: Offers remote deposit capture for business customers, enabling deposits without visiting a branch
Provides both online and mobile banking platforms for account access and management
Online loan applications available for personal, auto, and commercial loans
Online mortgage application accessible from computer, tablet, or phone
Integrated Zelle digital payment service for fund transfers
Multiple channels for account opening including online applications
cons: Website provides minimal detail on interest rates, fees, or product terms requiring customers to call or submit contact forms
Limited geographic footprint as a Kentucky-based regional bank compared to national banking alternatives
No information about competitive advantages, promotional offers, or special rates visible on the website

contact.address: 106 S Main Cross St, Flemingsburg, KY 41041

best_for: Kentucky-based business owners seeking agricultural or commercial lending
Customers who prefer traditional banking with digital convenience options
Small business owners needing merchant processing and remote deposit capabilities
diagnosis: Peoples Bank of Kentucky is best suited for Kentucky residents and business owners seeking traditional community banking with modern digital conveniences. The main caveat is that prospective customers must contact the bank directly to compare rates and terms, as specific pricing and product details are not published on their website.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
address: 106 S Main Cross St, Flemingsburg, KY 41041
